name: PaymentsOS
description: Enterprise payment orchestration platform (formerly Zooz) with smart routing and multi-PSP management.

seo.title: PaymentsOS — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: PaymentsOS: Enterprise payment orchestration platform (formerly Zooz) with smart routing and multi-PSP management.

when_to_use: Smart routing across multiple PSPs for enterprise merchants
Multi-PSP orchestration with failover and retry logic
Centralizing payment data from PSPs into a unified analytics layer

pros: Established orchestrator with smart-routing track record
Owned by PayU, giving scale and stability
Good PSP coverage for global enterprises
cons: Legacy brand (Zooz) can signal older codebase
review.verdict: Battle-tested enterprise orchestrator, but newer alternatives like Primer and Payrails often feel fresher.
review.best_for: Global enterprises comfortable with PayU-backed vendors and needing stable multi-PSP routing.
review.not_for: Dev-first teams expecting modern SDKs, open source, or fast product iteration.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
